# CWE-654: Reliance on a Single Factor in a Security Decision (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-654-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: admin access is granted based solely on a static header value.
func ExportUsers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.Header.Get("X-Api-Key") != "legacy-admin-key" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, email FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "error", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	var out []map[string]interface{}
	for rows.Next() {
		var id int
		var email string
		_ = rows.Scan(&id, &email)
		out = append(out, map[string]interface{}{"id": id, "email": email})
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(out)
}
